title: task-outcome-report-plan-amendment
rawUserRequest: 继续把 AI Cockpit Task Outcome Report 开发指示追加到当前计划后面；按轻量文档 Gate 执行；并把最后一个任务改为发布新版本。

declaredIntent.summary: Append the complete Task Outcome Report implementation program and make publish-new-version the final plan Work Item.

outOfScope: Implementing Task Outcome Report runtime code, schema, generator, validator, events, or renderer
Changing existing Work Item implementation scope or historical plan/archive records
Creating, tagging, or publishing a new software version in this plan-document Work Item

sources.reason: User-provided Task Outcome Report development instruction and release-final sequencing decision.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item appends a bounded implementation plan only; no runtime or release operation is executed.

executionDecision.reason: Authorized plan-document amendment with lightweight documentation gates.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The plan contains a headed Plan Extension: AI Cockpit Task Outcome Report section after Work Item 12.

The extension defines Outcome JSON/Markdown sources, required sections, Evidence bindings, append-only events, generator, validator, ai-finish/archive/PR integration, privacy, multilingual rendering, tests, documentation, and acceptance.
The plan table contains Outcome Work Items 13–22, each depending on the prior Work Item and retaining one Work Item = one branch = one PR.
The plan table ends with Work Item 23 publish-new-version, and the detailed section states it is the only actual publication task and has no successor.
The amendment Contract states runtime implementation and publication are out of scope and the diff is limited to plan/governance evidence.
guidelines: Keep this Work Item limited to the execution plan document and generated governance evidence.
Do not silently omit user-provided requirements; preserve evidence, privacy, anti-score, multilingual, lifecycle, and acceptance constraints.
Keep actual new-version publication as the final Work Item of the complete plan, after all preceding Work Items close.
Do not modify historical archive or issue records.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Task Outcome Report requirements are appended after existing Work Item 12
Actual new-version publication is the final Work Item with no successor
evidence: Work Item Summary table and publish-new-version section in the plan

intent.problem: The current plan needs the complete Task Outcome Report development instruction appended, and the user has now required that actual new-version publication be the final task of the entire plan.
constraints: This Work Item changes the plan document only and uses the lightest appropriate documentation gate.
Every proposed implementation Work Item retains one Work Item = one branch = one PR and closes fully before the next begins.
The final release Work Item must be last and must include strict release verification, publication, post-publication verification, PR/merge, and cleanup.
intent.rationale: Separating the plan amendment from runtime implementation keeps the new requirements reviewable while making the final release sequencing explicit.

verification.reason: Plan-only amendment uses lightweight documentation gates; full runtime quality is deferred to implementation Work Items.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
